productDisplayName: John Players Men Check Blue Shirt
description: Style noteThis john players shirt gets a sartorial stamp of approval, with it's refined collar, silhouetted tailoring and it's fine, luxe fabric. Make the right impression with this shirt - be it on lazy weekends or during after-hours dinner. The best bet for semi-formal Fridays, wear this with fitted denims and ankle boots!Product DetailsBlue, yellow, white and black checked shirt, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, full buttoned placket, buttoned pockets on the front, embroidered branding above the left chest pocket and a curved hem Material and Care100% cottonDry clean or machine wash with like colours onlyUse a non-chlorine bleach if neededLine dry inside-out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitTrim FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size 40
